description: OpenCode TUI embedded in VS Code with proper keyboard handling for non-Latin layouts
viewContainer.title: OpenCode
view.terminal.name: Terminal
cmd.focusView.title: OpenCode
cmd.openTerminal.title: OpenCode: Open Terminal
cmd.openTab.title: OpenCode: Open Terminal (Tab)
cmd.stopServer.title: OpenCode: Stop Server
cmd.attachFile.title: Attach to OpenCode
config.title: OpenCode TUI Integration
cfg.opencodePath.desc: Path to opencode. E.g. 'C:/Users/ilgiz/AppData/Local/OpenCode/opencode.exe', 'opencode.cmd', or just 'opencode'.
cfg.serverPort.desc: Port for opencode server. 0 = random available port.
cfg.leaderChords.desc: Leader chord characters to intercept (e.g. ["n","m","l"]). Empty = use tui.json or built-in defaults.
